zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Peverell於1530年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親William de Peverell IV21歲，母親Jane Trenchard48歲。他和Isabella Jane Trenchard至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1575年享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Peverell was born in 1530, in Durham, England, his father, William de Peverell IV, was 21 and his mother, Jane Trenchard, was 48. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Isabella Jane Trenchard. He died about 1575, at the age of 46.

ko.Exeter St Martin, Exeter, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 마틴
ko.lifeSummary: John de Peverell(이)가 1530년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Peverell IV(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Trenchard(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Isabella Jane Trenchard(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1575년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
